title: Openers v2 — opener-05 show-you (Hallo2 quality tier, judge-winner audio)

inputRefs.sourceClip: single source still src_opener05.jpg (square face crop per Hallo2 spec) — Hallo2 still-animation tier
inputRefs.script: Let me show you what that would look like with an agent doing it. (5.0 s)
inputRefs.ttsReference: CosyVoice2 clone, openers-v2 audio bake-off winner zs-s7 (zero-shot on sarah_voice_ref_v1.wav, seed 7 — the only zero-shot winner; long-reference candidates won 01-04); wav at gs://openagentsgemini-oa-artifacts/sarah-avatar/openers-v2/opener-05-show-you.wav

modelVersions.hallo2: Hallo2 (MIT) inference_long.py, 512^2 audio-driven portrait animation, 16-frame chunks x 40 DDIM steps, net.pth + wav2vec2-base-960h
modelVersions.video_sr: Hallo2 scripts/video_sr.py x4 (CodeFormer architecture + Hallo2 net_g.pth VFHQ weights + RealESRGAN_x2plus bg) — upstream header requires S-Lab License 1.0 compliance: RESEARCH-ONLY, non-shippable

inputRefs.renderCommand: python scripts/inference_long.py --config configs/inference/v2_opener05.yaml (A100 40GB); python scripts/video_sr.py -i <merge> -o <out> --bg_upsampler realesrgan --face_upsample -w 1 -s 4
inputRefs.recipe: Hallo2 still-animation quality tier: judged winner audio over a single calm source still; re-mux with full-band judged wav, measured-gain normalization +1.3 dB to -16.9 LUFS (alimiter ceiling -3.8 dB), libx264 CRF16 slow; SR variant is evaluation-only (license)

sttRoundTrip.transcriber: whisper small.en on the final mux
sttRoundTrip.notes: verbatim: 'Let me show you what that would look like with an agent doing it.'

pauseTiming.notes: judge flagged slightly robotic pacing on 'what that would look like' and flat intonation on the final words

prosody.notes: judge also flagged low-frequency background rumble; sub-8 overall — flagged for a future audio re-roll if owner playback confirms the judge

ownerPlaybackVerdict.notes: awaiting owner playback of ~/Desktop/sarah-openers-v2/ copies — stills never advance a take

avSync.notes: speech onset articulation visible in first consecutive-frame strip; full 3-point sync check deferred to playback review

cropSharpness.notes: 512^2 native output is soft vs 720p source footage; SR x4 variant recovers texture but is license-encumbered (S-Lab) — serving upscale strategy open

temporalBoil.notes: 6 consecutive frames at t=2.5 s: smooth articulation with visible teeth, zero boil, stable identity

metrics.periodicHitch: no dominant mod-16 phase (max 1.87 vs 1.14 mean) — longest clip in the batch (8 chunks) shows the flattest phase profile

chunkBoundaryJerk.notes: numbers NOT comparable to MuseTalk-lane takes (full-face 512^2 portrait crop with real generated head/face motion vs 720p paste-back mouth crop); healthy articulation vs the under-articulated v1 opener-05

identityDrift.notes: identity faithful to source still across sampled frames

pasteBackSeam.notes: no paste-back — Hallo2 generates the full frame

videoGates.notes: Hallo2 generates head/eye/face motion matched to speech — eliminates the source-motion conflict that sank opener library v1

operationalGates.gpuType: GCE a2-highgpu-1g, 1x NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40GB (us-central1-f, SPOT) — sarah-hallo2-exp-1
operationalGates.costNotes: ~250 s inference + ~250 s SR at ~$1.30/h spot; idle-host waste booked in the run closeout receipt

artifactExistenceCheck.notes: gsutil stat on final + SR + qa crops in gs://…/openers-v2/

verdictSummary: Longest clip in the batch, only zero-shot audio winner (judge 7/10). STT verbatim PASS, healthy articulation (fixes v1's under-articulated opener-05), flattest chunk-phase profile. Awaiting owner playback.
